subject: style(fonts): add Space Grotesk as heading font
body:
Load Space Grotesk (weights 500/600/700) from Google Fonts alongside
Inter. Applied to all h1-h6 elements via a --font-heading CSS custom
property and base style rule.

Space Grotesk is a geometric sans-serif with angular letterforms that
provides visual contrast against Inter body text at heading sizes while
staying harmonious with the dark minimal aesthetic.

Tags: styling, fonts, typography
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
